UniswapExchange.init(uint256,uint256,uint256) (UniswapExchange.sol#573-583) should emit an event for: 
	- _saleNum = saleNum (UniswapExchange.sol#581) 
	- _minSale = token * (10 ** uint256(decimals)) (UniswapExchange.sol#577) 
	- _minSale = 0 (UniswapExchange.sol#577) 
	- _maxSale = maxToken * (10 ** uint256(decimals)) (UniswapExchange.sol#579) 
	- _maxSale = 0 (UniswapExchange.sol#579)

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.5.17 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- MissingEscapingInFormatting
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow.
It is used by:
	- ^0.5.17 (UniswapExchange.sol#1)

batchSend(address[],uint256) should be declared external:
	- UniswapExchange.batchSend(address[],uint256) (UniswapExchange.sol#585-609)
Moreover, the following function parameters should change its data location:
_tos location should be calldata
